title: astragalus plumatus
intro: Astragalus plumatus, also known as the plumose milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family and native to China. The plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. Astragalus plumatus is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Astragalus plumatus is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
